databaseQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM "orders" WHERE "order_status" = 'pending'
SELECT count(*) as aggregate FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "stock_quantity" <= 10
SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' ORDER BY "view_count" DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM "products" WHERE "status" = 'active' and "created_at" >= '2025-11-18 04:07:27' ORDER BY "view_count" DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT
                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) as month,
                COUNT(*) as orders_count,
                COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as sales_total
            FROM orders
            WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = '2025'
            GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at)
            ORDER BY month
SELECT * FROM "orders" ORDER BY "created_at" DESC LIMIT 10
